robots.semantics: Official xArm gripper TCP offset is included; detailed gripper geometry and actuation are not modeled.

canonical_frame.name: parallel_jaw_pinch_tcp
canonical_frame.y_axis: finger opening/closing direction between left and right jaws
canonical_frame.z_axis: tool approach direction from palm/wrist toward the pinch point

tool_frame_mappings.rationale: Source orientation is passed directly to the target TCP. This preserves legacy diagnostic behavior but is not a canonical pose-fairness claim.
